_comment: Field map for FNMA Form 1073 — Individual Condominium Unit Appraisal. Updated for Phase 5.
_phase: Phase 5 - Desktop Agent Calibration for 1073 Condo Units
_calibration: HOW TO CALIBRATE: 1) Open ACI with a 1073 report loaded. 2) Start desktop_agent/agent.py. 3) Run: python desktop_agent/calibrate_aci.py — copy automation_id and class_name/class_index values from the output. 4) POST http://localhost:5180/reload-maps to apply. 5) Run: python _test_aci_live.py 1073 to verify.

_schema.label: Human-readable field label (used for label-match fallback)
_schema.automation_id: UIA AutomationId — MOST RELIABLE. Fill in from /calibrate output.
_schema.class_name: Windows class name for RichEdit controls (e.g. 'RichEdit20W'). Fill in from /calibrate output.
_schema.class_index: 0-based index among controls of this class_name. Fill in from /calibrate output.
_schema.control_index: 0-based index among ALL text-input controls. Fill in from /calibrate output as fallback.
_schema.max_chars: Maximum character limit for the field (ACI enforces strict limits)

narratives._comment: Main narrative sections for 1073 report (AI-generated text fields). Inherits from 1004, plus condo-specific sections.

offering_history.label: Offering History
offering_history.notes: Contract section — narrative about prior listing/offering history specific to condo unit

contract_analysis.label: Contract Analysis
contract_analysis.notes: Contract section — analysis of agreement of sale, financing, seller concessions

neighborhood_boundaries.label: Neighborhood Boundaries
neighborhood_boundaries.notes: Neighborhood section — cardinal direction boundaries. Inherits from 1004.

neighborhood_description.label: Neighborhood Description
neighborhood_description.notes: Neighborhood section — description. Inherits from 1004. Field mapping calibrated at 1004, reused for 1073.

market_conditions.label: Market Conditions Addendum
market_conditions.notes: Neighborhood section — market conditions. Inherits from 1004.

site_comments.label: Site Description
site_comments.notes: Site section — for condo unit, typically describes project site and unit location. Inherits from 1004.

improvements_condition.label: Improvements / Condition Narrative
improvements_condition.notes: Improvements section — condition rating, construction details, unit-specific features, common elements accessibility. Inherits from 1004.

adverse_conditions.label: Adverse Conditions / External Factors
adverse_conditions.notes: Improvements section — adverse conditions specific to unit or project (HOA violations, common area issues, etc.)

condo_project_analysis.label: Condo Project Analysis
condo_project_analysis.notes: Subject section — critical for 1073: HOA health, reserve fund adequacy, owner-occupancy ratio, special assessments, legal compliance, common elements

sales_comparison_commentary.label: Sales Comparison Commentary
sales_comparison_commentary.notes: Sales section — comparable selection rationale emphasizing same-project vs. competing-project comps and condo premium/discount

reconciliation.label: Reconciliation
reconciliation.notes: Reconciliation section — reconciliation of three approaches with final value conclusion. HIGH PRIORITY. Inherits from 1004.

project_level_fields._comment: Condo project-specific data fields extracted from 1076 Condo Questionnaire or HOA documentation

hoa_dues.label: HOA Monthly Dues
hoa_dues.notes: Subject section — monthly HOA dues amount

reserve_fund_adequacy.label: Reserve Fund Adequacy
reserve_fund_adequacy.notes: Subject section — reserve fund status: adequate, marginally adequate, inadequate

owner_occupancy_ratio.label: Owner-Occupancy Ratio
owner_occupancy_ratio.notes: Subject section — percentage of units owner-occupied (critical for financing eligibility)

special_assessments.label: Special Assessments
special_assessments.notes: Subject section — any planned or pending special assessments and amounts

total_units_in_project.label: Total Units in Project
total_units_in_project.notes: Subject section — total number of units in the condominium project

project_legal_compliance.label: Project Legal Compliance
project_legal_compliance.notes: Subject section — 1076 questionnaire findings: compliant, minor violations, major violations

pending_litigation.label: Pending Litigation / Liens
pending_litigation.notes: Subject section — any pending HOA litigation or liens affecting property

unit_level_fields._comment: Individual unit data fields (typically inherited from 1004 structure)

subject_address.label: Unit Address
subject_address.notes: Subject section — full address including unit number

unit_number.label: Unit Number
unit_number.notes: Subject section — unit identifier (e.g., 304, C-7, Unit 12)

year_built.label: Year Built
year_built.notes: Improvements section — year of project construction

bedrooms.label: Bedrooms
bedrooms.notes: Improvements section — number of bedrooms in subject unit

bathrooms.label: Bathrooms
bathrooms.notes: Improvements section — number of bathrooms (format: X or X.X for half baths)

unit_gla.label: Unit GLA
unit_gla.notes: Improvements section — gross living area of subject unit

_tab_positions._note: Tab navigation positions (to be filled in from ACI calibration). Same as 1004 since 1073 uses same ACI form template.

Subj.note: Subject section — includes condo project analysis fields

Site.note: Site section — for condo, describes project site

Impro.note: Improvements section — unit-specific features and project common elements

_1073_specific_guidance.condo_project_analysis: CRITICAL: Must address HOA financial health, reserve fund adequacy, owner-occupancy ratio (critical for fannie mae financing), pending litigation, legal compliance. This is the primary differentiator of 1073 vs 1004.
_1073_specific_guidance.comparable_selection: 1073 comps should include (1) same project units if available (best comp), (2) competing project units in similar location, (3) bracketing of subject condition/quality/size. Note any condo premium or discount.
_1073_specific_guidance.hoa_impact_on_value: Condo comps with different HOA dues, reserve fund adequacy, or legal issues will require adjustments. Document the impact of each factor on the subject's market position.
_1073_specific_guidance.common_area_access: Describe subject's access to and benefit from common elements (parking, recreation, security, maintenance). Comment on condition and functionality of shared facilities.
_1073_specific_guidance.financing_considerations: 1073 properties with low owner-occupancy, high HOA dues, inadequate reserves, or legal issues are difficult to finance. Note any financing implications in reconciliation.
